_comment: Performance budget. Phase 164 baseline + ~10% headroom. Phase 184: fileCount → 100. Phase 202: fileCount → 115 (Capacitor plugin chunks). Phase 209: totalKB → 2900 to make room for the liquidity engine (effective-cash-date + cash-flow-bucket + liquidity-curve compute + 3 dashboard cards). Update intentionally when a feature legitimately needs more bundle.
